source.note: "Natural Korean Conversation with 태웅쌤 | 이렇게 귀하신 분이 ①" by Didi's Korean Culture Podcast, used under Creative Commons Attribution license (reuse allowed). Speaker labels are the recogniser's, not ours. music[] is empty because no music detector ran, not because the clip is known to be clean. silence[] is derived from VAD segment boundaries (gaps ≥ 0.6s), not from an energy floor.

note: A run that actually happened on 2026-07-13, against real CC-BY media. Source lines are gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize; the confidence the gates read is cross-recogniser agreement with whisper-1, because gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize returns no logprobs and a confidence we cannot measure is one we do not print.
